steps.name: environment-preset-contract
steps.summary: Added flat-lab, instrumented-lab, and rough-terrain environment preset contract, React environment selector, window.demo.qaEnvironmentSummary(), and qa/environment_check.mjs. Verified build, flat-lab, instrumented-lab, and existing workbench QA without changing MuJoCo physics/runtime behavior.

steps.name: laboratory-scene-visuals
steps.summary: Added a Three.js-only Lab Visual Layer driven by the environment preset contract. Presets now apply background, fog, lighting, grid, axes, height bands, contact rails, or terrain lane markers while reporting visualOnly/collision=none-threejs-only in qaEnvironmentSummary. Verified build, flat/instrumented/rough environment checks, desktop visual check, and mobile visual check without changing MJCF contact geometry.

steps.name: grounding-physics-controls
steps.summary: Added grounding mode controls and QA recording without mutating MuJoCo physics. The environment summary now distinguishes replay-locked, assisted-fixture, physics-contact, and controller-backed claims, preserves raw requested aliases, records applied mode/evidence requirement/warnings, and validates --grounding=assisted plus --grounding=physics in environment_check.mjs. Workbench regression passed for assisted stand and reference-vs-WBC compare.
